data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Time-off and PTO tracking' as part of the saga. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for time-off and PTO tracking, but there are no concrete examples or evidence of this feature being tested or validated in the current saga run, leading to a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of time-off and PTO tracking functionality being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
